message:
Fix frontend teardown and scroll coalescing issues

- search.js: Extract destroyVirtualResultsView() to centralize virtual
  list teardown + layout reset across all code paths (no-results, error,
  clear, direct-render). Error path now also hides stale no-results UI.
- session.js: Call setupCleanupHandlers() on session restore so
  visibilitychange/beforeunload listeners are reinstalled for restored
  sessions.
- virtual-list.js: Coalesce rapid scroll events into a single
  requestAnimationFrame call and cancel pending frames on destroy to
  prevent callbacks firing on destroyed lists.
- Add tests for cleanup path consistency, restored session handler
  registration, and scroll frame coalescing behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
